name: law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month tool
description: For law firms managing 5–15 contracts/month, missed contract milestone deadlines cause penalties. We provide automated alerts instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets or calendars.
problem_solved: Missed contract milestone deadlines can lead to penalties and damaged client relationships.
